allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f'{m[\\"id\\"]} - {m[\\"title\\"]} \({m[\\"status\\"]}\)'\) for m in data[:5]]")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Title: {d[\\"title\\"]}'\); print\(f'Status: {d[\\"status\\"]}'\); print\(f'Segments: {len\(d.get\(\\"transcript_segments\\",[]\)\)}'\); print\(f'Action items: {len\(d.get\(\\"action_items\\",[]\)\)}'\); print\(f'Summaries: {len\(d.get\(\\"summaries\\",[]\)\)}'\)")
